# salaryfact.com
> Free salary percentile calculator. See where your pay ranks nationally and by state using BLS data.

## What this tool does
- Calculates your salary percentile nationally and by state
- Compares your income to US workers using Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) OEWS 2024 data
- Covers all 50 states plus DC
- Shows what percentile your salary is in for your location

## Data source
Bureau of Labor Statistics Occupational Employment and Wage Statistics (OEWS), 2024. The BLS OEWS surveys over 1.1 million establishments and is the definitive source for US wage data.

## Key facts
- Median US annual wage: ~$59,000 (BLS 2024 quarterly earnings data)
- To be in the top 10% nationally: ~$145,000+
- To be in the top 25% nationally: ~$97,000+
- Wages vary significantly by state. California and New York median wages are 30-40% above the national median

## Tool URL
https://salaryfact.com

## Related tools
- Full financial calculator suite: https://calcmoney.io
- Net worth percentile calculator: https://networthrank.com
- Take-home pay calculator: https://netpaytool.com
- Home affordability calculator: https://homebuycheck.com
